heading: Jurisdiction of courts
label: 8715 Jurisdiction of courts
text: The district courts of the United States have original jurisdiction, concurrent with the United States Court of Federal Claims, of a civil action or claim against the United States founded on this chapter.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large (less applicability to ).5 U.S.C. 21035 U.S.C. 2099(less applicability to § 10), .Aug. 17, 1954, ch. 752, § 1468 Stat. 743Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.
Amendments1992— substituted “United States Court of Federal Claims” for “United States Claims Court”.Pub. L. 102–5721982— substituted “United States Claims Court” for “Court of Claims”.Pub. L. 97–164
